<?php /** * secp160k1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\KoblitzPrime; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class secp160k1 extends KoblitzPrime { public function __construct() { // same as secp160r2 $this->setModulo(new BigInteger('FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFEFFFFAC73', 16)); $this->setCoefficients( new BigInteger('0000000000000000000000000000000000000000', 16), new BigInteger('0000000000000000000000000000000000000007', 16) ); $this->setBasePoint( new BigInteger('3B4C382CE37AA192A4019E763036F4F5DD4D7EBB', 16), new BigInteger('938CF935318FDCED6BC28286531733C3F03C4FEE', 16) ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('0100000000000000000001B8FA16DFAB9ACA16B6B3', 16)); $this->basis = []; $this->basis[] = [ 'a' => new BigInteger('0096341F1138933BC2F505', -16), 'b' => new BigInteger('FF6E9D0418C67BB8D5F562', -16) ]; $this->basis[] = [ 'a' => new BigInteger('01BDCB3A09AAAABEAFF4A8', -16), 'b' => new BigInteger('04D12329FF0EF498EA67', -16) ]; $this->beta = $this->factory->newInteger(new BigInteger('645B7345A143464942CC46D7CF4D5D1E1E6CBB68', -16)); } }
